item.title: One million more pensioners set to pay income tax in 2031 – how to lower your bill
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of pensioners will be dragged into paying income tax due to an ongoing freeze to tax bands, forecasts suggest

item.title: The UK regions with the highest proportion of homes above the inheritance tax threshold
item.description: High house prices are pushing more families into the inheritance tax trap across the country
